title: Agent Identity Record
description: Persistent, cryptographically verifiable record of an agent's existence, public key, and status. See SPEC.md §4.1.

axis_version.description: Protocol version. MUST be '0.1' for v0.1 records.

agent_id.description: Globally unique AXIS identifier in the form axis:{operator}:{agent-name}.

operator_id.description: The operator slug controlling this agent. Matches the operator component of agent_id.

public_key.description: Ed25519 public key, base64url-encoded (RFC 4648 §5, no padding).

key_algorithm.description: Signature algorithm. MUST be 'Ed25519' for v0.1.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the agent.

registry_url.description: Absolute HTTPS URL where this record can be resolved.

revocation_url.description: Absolute HTTPS URL where the agent's revocation status can be checked.

did.description: W3C DID form of the agent identifier, typically did:axis:{registry}:{agent-slug}. Optional.

display_name.description: Human-readable name. Presentation-layer field; not always exposed.

purpose.description: Plain-language description of the agent's function. Presentation-layer field.

capability_tier.description: Advisory capability signal: 1 (narrow tool), 2 (scoped assistant), 3 (full agent). Presentation-layer field.
